property_description: Esplanade is the ideal business location at the heart of the Camelback corridor in Phoenix, just minutes from downtown, located at the corner of 24th Street and Camelback Road. The majority of the offices have views of either Camelback Mountain or the world class Biltmore Golf Resort. We are located next to the Ritz Carlton Hotel and across the street from the Biltmore Fashion Park as well as a host of business class hotels literally within sight. Our clients enjoy 24 hour access to their offices and convenient covered parking is always available.

The neighborhoodÕs eclectic culture comes through in the interior design, which is anything but corporate. Relaxing lounges and spacious offices create the perfect coworking space for any company. Members here range from photographers and graphic designers to lawyers and consultants. Take advantage of BerkeleyÕs happening bars and restaurants or head downstairs to enjoy some Ippudo ramen or Blue Bottle Coffee. ThereÕs bike storage in the front lobby, and a BART station is two blocks away. If youÕre looking for the perfect environment to release your creativity, WeWork Berkeley is just right for you and your team.

Directly across the street from the Spectrum Center, one of Southern CaliforniaÕs most popular entertainment destinations, this Irvine office space is a thriving community designed to inspire. Treat yourself to a meal at a stellar restaurant, or laugh it up at a comedy show. In a shimmering glass tower, this coworking space occupies the entire third and fourth floors. The interior designÑsome of it inspired by Wes AndersonÕs film The Grand Budapest HotelÑincludes a neon sculpture of a dog and other whimsical touches. The wide windows provide breathtaking views of the surrounding neighborhood, and a patio on the first floor encourages everyone to enjoy the warm weather. The building has a state-of-the-art gym on the second floor. Parking is across the street and features bike storage and a charging station for electric vehicles. If youÕre looking for a space in one of the areaÕs most sought-after neighborhoods, itÕs hard to beat WeWork Spectrum Center.

Just outside of the nationÕs capital, this D.C.-area office space occupies the top two floors of a building that features relaxed common areas, spacious conference rooms, and big windows letting in lots of natural light. WeWork Salesforce Tower is a one-of-a-kind in the WeWork portfolio, offering three spacious floors of coworking and office space in a 61-story buildingÑthe tallest on the West Coast. Sitting pretty on the 36th, 37th, and 38th floors, this space serves as a homebase for ambitious members working in tech. Whether you commute by car or rail, weÕve got you covered with the Transbay Transit Center right next door, BART two blocks away, and the freeway three blocks over. Plus, weÕve got onsite parking and bike storage. Adding to the allure, this space features unique amenities like a full service barista and 3 story atrium, plus tons of neighborhood hotspots nearby for weekday lunches and client dinners. Join WeWork Salesforce Tower and say hello to SoMa office space unlike any other.

44 Montgomery is a 43-story, Class 'A' office tower centrally located in the downtown San Francisco Central Business District. Designed by renowned architect John Graham (Seattle Space Needle) and built in 1966, it was originally the World Headquarters for Wells Fargo Bank and once the tallest building west of the Mississippi. Rofo tip: Right on top of Bart. This is the building with Starbucks and First Republic on the ground floor.

In the heart of downtown, this Seattle office space occupies all six floors of the Holyoke Building, the first to be constructed after the Great Seattle Fire of 1889. There are lots of open and airy common spaces and an event space on the lower level. Feel free to bring in your dog to workÑitÕs a great way to meet other members. Pioneer Square, filled with great restaurants, is just a few blocks away. YouÕre easy walking distance from the Seattle Ferry Terminal, and the closest bus stop is a couple of blocks away. ThereÕs parking in a building just across the street. For an office space that combines a historic feel with a modern vibe, come to WeWork Holyoke.
